creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 152318
svn diff for net/xrdesktop

net/xrdesktop has been fairly unmaintained, as is the currently
listed WWW -- domain expired 2 weeks ago, and is now a 403 to
godaddy. As a result, a new GTK2 version has been created to
replace it: net/xrdesktop2
(https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=197157)
This version is more modern, and is actively developed, and
maintained.

As a result; This is a proposal to EOL net/xrdesktop on 2015-02-30
or before, should that seem a better choice.

Please find attached, an svn diff that accommodates this,
and provides an alternative.

Thank you for all your time, and consideration.

--Chris
